subject: Ob Nixilis — a massive armored demon with curved horns and glowing eyes, crushing a small glowing bird between his hands
description: A towering demonic figure looms forward in close mid-shot, occupying nearly the full frame. It wears heavy dark armor with cracked lines across the torso that glow a deep molten red-orange. Its face — visible from mid-range — shows curved horns, glowing eyes, and a wide grin of sadistic pleasure. Between its large hands, a small bird glows brilliant white-gold, held captive. The contrast between the dark burning demon and the luminous bird is stark and deliberate. The background is deep crimson, matching the hellish palette. The overall scene communicates domination and torment.
foreground: armored demon with horns and glowing cracked torso, holding a glowing bird between its hands
emotion: sadistic glee — wide grin, forward lean, total domination in body language
